name: Easy Baked Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the pork and beans with the brown sugar, dry mustard, and ketchup until well combined.
2. Arrange the bacon pieces on top of the bean mixture.
3. Place the dish in an oven preheated to 325 degrees Fahrenheit (163 degrees Celsius).
4. Bake for at least 1 hour, or longer if a thicker consistency is desired.
